name: 谢丽·蒙泰桑托
name_full: 谢丽·蒙泰桑托 Cheri Montesanto
introduction: Cheri Montesanto is a three time Emmy Award Winner for Makeup. She is known for creating interesting and diverse characters on many hit shows including, Better Call Saul and The X-Files. She is the Department Head for not only Makeup but also Special-Effects Makeup. In addition, she is the CEO of Cheri International Inc, where she designs and creates the many Special Effects Makeups that she utilizes on her shows.
